intro: Anthoshorea ochracea, also known as 'Orange Coral Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant is valued for its traditional medicinal uses, which include treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, thanks to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
